# Seed Components & Storybook

**Context**

Create the initial component seeds (Button, Card, Badge) and set up Storybook stories so designers and developers can iterate in isolation.

## Goals

- Implement seed components under `components/ui/`.
- Configure Storybook (or document how to run it) and add stories for each seed component.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Components created: `Button`, `Card`, `Badge` with props typed in TypeScript.
- Storybook stories added for each component demonstrating variants and states.
- README includes how to run Storybook and how to add stories.

## Tasks

- [ ] Implement `components/ui/Button.tsx` with variants.
- [ ] Implement `components/ui/Card.tsx` and `components/ui/Badge.tsx`.
- [ ] Add Storybook configuration and stories under `.storybook/` and `stories/`.
- [ ] Write short README for Storybook usage.

## Estimate

Owner role: Frontend Specialist
Estimate: 12 - 16 hours
